purpose: Thin per-deposit INDEX into the recovered external metadata for this deposit's legacy Zenodo DOIs. The actual records live in the bulk data stores under data/ (openalex-severed-recovery.json, zenodo-xml-pretermination-2026-06-07.tar.gz, datacite-full-backup.json, datacite-survivors-multi-heteronym.json). Sidecars do not duplicate those records — they map each covered DOI to its identifier in each store.

10.5281/zenodo.20644757.title: A Referee Report on AI_Bleeding: Semantic Exhaustion via Out-of-Distribution Linguistic Payload — The Paper's Own Compute Metric Refutes Its Attack-Vector Claim (EA-REFEREE-AIBLEEDING-01 v1.1)

10.5281/zenodo.19923120.title: Constitution of the Semantic Economy — Enacted Version 1.0: Installable Edition with Constitutional Apparatus

10.5281/zenodo.20645865.title: The Press Layer of the Crimson Hexagonal Archive: Journal and Imprint Architectural Specification (EA-PRESS-ARCH-01 v1.0)

10.5281/zenodo.19545439.title: Transactions on Substrate Engineering (TSE) — Journal Charter (00.TSE.CHARTER)

10.5281/zenodo.19512987.title: CALL FOR PAPERS: The Distributed Journal as Counter-Infrastructure — Metadata-Coordinated Publication After the Legacy Journal (Crimson Hexagonal Archive)

10.5281/zenodo.19652600.title: new human 2: a distributed journal of voice — Charter, Compiled Edition (2015), and Issue 1 of New Human 2 (2026)

10.5281/zenodo.19099770.title: The Pergamon Reclamation: Retrocausal Canon Formation and the Forensic Philology of Academic Publishing

openalex.lookup: records[].doi == this DOI; openalex_id is the W-prefixed OpenAlex Work ID

zenodo_bulk_xml.lookup: extract <record_id>.xml from the tarball where record_id is the digits after 'zenodo.'

datacite_survivor_sweep.lookup: search records[].attributes.doi == this DOI across orcid_records, name_records, sigil_records, vox_records, feist_records
